name: Spotify
description: Audio streaming and media services platform offering music, podcasts, and audiobooks.

years.notes: Original launch mark: avocado-green rounded square badge with serif 'Spotify' wordmark and three sound-wave arcs above the 'o'. Used 2008–2012.
2013 redesign: dropped the square badge and serif font, introduced the standalone circular icon with three white arcs on a bright green circle. Used 2013–2015.
2015 update: brightened the green to the vibrant #1ED760 and switched the wordmark to a clean sans-serif. The icon shape is unchanged from 2013. Used 2015–2024.
May 2024 brand refresh: arcs adjusted to point marginally more to the right, new 'Spotify Mix' typeface for wordmark. Core green (#1ED760) unchanged.
